seo.title: About | The Divine Blueprint
seo.description: About — The Divine Blueprint discipleship journey.

textFields.label: Main heading — A Platform for Spiritual Formation
Paragraph — The Divine Blueprint exists to help believers understand and co…
textFields.value: The Divine Blueprint exists to help believers understand and cooperate with God’s process of making mature sons.

textFields.label: Paragraph — The book is the foundation. The website expands each chapter th…
textFields.value: The book is the foundation. The website expands each chapter through Bible studies, teaching series, podcast conversations, journal exercises, and group resources.

textFields.label: Paragraph — The Divine Blueprint is a discipleship initiative of Gleaning G…
textFields.value: The Divine Blueprint is a discipleship initiative of Gleaning Ground, created to equip believers with Scripture-centered resources for spiritual growth and faithful service.

textFields.label: Paragraph — Ayo-Paul Ikujuni is a Christian author and teacher committed to…
textFields.value: Ayo-Paul Ikujuni is a Christian author and teacher committed to helping believers grow in their identity, maturity, and kingdom responsibility.
